transcript.text:
This building is 100 years old
They limit their sales to only 25 orders per day
[Since 1968, 53 years of tradition]
The sauce alone takes 8 hours to make
This smell?
Hello everyone
I'm here at Incheon today
This restaurant opened in 1968
They've been selling pork cutlets for nearly 60 years
The owner refused to be on shows or social media
Such as show programs, vloggers, YouTubers, etc
He said he has never approved it
But he gave permission for the very first time for me to film
[Dances]
This building is 100 years old
The menu

It's called don-piece not donkatsu
He only sells 25 dishes per day
He will close for the day once he sells that 25
Let's head inside
You can definitely see its age
It's the very first we are allowing anyone to film since 1968
And we plan on not allowing it after this one time
Really? [Honored]
How many serving is 1 order?
That's 1 serving
I'll start off with 5 orders, please
Soup... Wait, it's a carrot soup?
Yes, carrots and ginger
No thank you Just the pork cutlet
[Happy]
This sauce takes 8 hours to make

Thank you That looks cool
I've never seen anything like it
Thank you
The pork cutlet looks interesting
The sauce looks watery
The cutlet itself looks different
Ta-da Looks delicious
They limit their sales to only 25 dishes per day
I requested to film here 2 weeks ago so he gave me permission to do so
Are 5 people not going to be able to eat here because of me?
No, we don't get customers anyway (Joking)
Let me give you some jalapenos
Thank you
It comes out sliced
Bon appetit
The bottom looks soggy That's how thin the sauce is

It tastes like something I ate as a kid
The smell itself
brings back memories of my childhood
Indeed
The outside is very soft because of the sauce
The sauce is different from a common pork cutlet sauce
I can taste some sourness
It's a very traditional cutlet
The texture is chewy(?)
Tasty
It doesn't taste like your average pork cutlet
The fries look delicious
Yum
My type of fries
Yummy
Over here

The sauce is perfect for some white rice
I already finished this plate
Am I supposed to cut this?
It really brings back memories
Since he gave me the jalapenos..
It's spicy
Is that spicy?
Jalapenos are supposed to be spicy, right?
Let's get some white rice
With a piece of cutlet
My clothes..
This is why you don't get greedy
No one's ever eaten 5 plates at our restaurant
I've never seen anyone eat that much
It's very soft because of the sauce
It's good dipping in the sauce

Excuse me,
If you only sell 25 plates,
how do you make a profit?
Wouldn't you want to sell more?
That's too tiring
[He runs the place on his own]
Every bite is different Strange
It really reminds me of what I ate as a kid
Well, you're still young
Right, I'm talking about when I was a little girl
The sauce here is definitely different than the sauce we have now
I personally do not like the fried breadcrumbs because it scrapes the inside of my mouth
But these are very soft on the outside It's delicious
These are pretty thick
It may not seem that big
But I can feel it as I'm eating it

Bigger portion than other pork cutlet restaurants
This is delicious
It's like the fries I had from America
Are you getting full now? No
I'm doing fine
I tried my best to eat the vegetables,
I know you don't eat the veggies You did well
I tried..
Maybe I can finish this but that's it
It's big
The pieces are big
4 of these..
The outside is getting more soft as time goes by
It's more like a soup than a sauce
The sauce seemed very unique from the photos too
The fork just stabs right in

Okay, this piece is really thick
It's huge
It's a big portion for 1 serving
You usually get sick of the taste after a huge plate like this,
But this one is very clean, so it feels like it's easier to eat
It's not greasy at all
It should have built up by now
The outside is covered in the sauce
And the meat is very light
I have 1 more left
I can eat more
I can do 3 more
I ate these so fast
You need to check your health at the hospital
I did
They said nothing was wrong with me

[Don't worry, I'm healthy]
[When did I finish all the fries...?]
A perfect palate cleanser
I have some rice left I'll eat it
Let's move it to the sauce
I came to Incheon today
And got very lucky to film here for the very first time
The taste brought back memories of the pork cutlet that I ate as a kid
It didn't feel heavy or greasy at all
They only sell 25 plates per day
I think that's what makes this place so special
Thanks everyone
The bill, please
Thank you so much for letting us film here
Thank you right back
Thank you! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
